message:
fix(node): hash collision, integer overflow, and error swallowing fixes across 11 files

- Hash collision: replace unwrap_or_default() with error-tagged strings before
  SHA-256 in verifier_sdk (binding hash), state_model (integrity check),
  reputation and certification (audit chain hashes)
- Integer overflow: saturating_mul for p99 rank in remote_bulkhead,
  saturating_add folds in migration_speed_failure_metrics and
  safe_extension_onboarding, u32::try_from in operator_intelligence
- Error swallowing: thread panic sentinel in lockstep_harness join

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
